purpose: Track kit ownership, service surfaces, manifest authority blockers, RuntimeSourceSnapshot requirements, ActionFrame/ActionResult intake, RunnerSourceState snapshots, RunnerStepResult authority, RunnerEvent journaling, ContactEvent replay, SceneDispatchResult ownership, GameHost diagnostics, DOM-free smoke fixtures, and the run-movement-kit promotion boundary for the PrehistoricRush runner repo.

selectionPolicy.selectionReason: PrehistoricRush had the oldest latest central ledger timestamp among eligible tracked non-Cavalry Publish repos at the start of this pass.
selectionPolicy.currentRepoRole: thin publish shell for a NexusEngine-powered prehistoric infinite runner

currentRuntimeSummary.runtimeEntryStatus: src/runtime.mjs is thin and imports the active runtime directly.
currentRuntimeSummary.validationSurface: No package.json exists; validation should begin with static/source-level and DOM-free fixture smoke.

repoShouldNotOwnLongTerm: manual score and result rules that become reusable

sourceOfTruthCutover.canonicalNextSlice: PrehistoricRush Manifest Action Contact Fixture Matrix + Run Movement Promotion Gate
sourceOfTruthCutover.problem: game-scenes.json, scenes/game.json, runner-tuning.json, kit-composition.json, kit-cutover-inventory.json, and flock-generation.json define product intent, but src/runtime-terrain-v6.mjs still duplicates live tuning, scene transitions, input semantics, contact outcomes, spawn budgets, win threshold, source snapshot shape, and host diagnostics inline.
driftObserved: runtime terrain.seed = 238991 vs runner-tuning.json terrain.seed = prehistoric-rush-infinite-terrain-v1
game-scenes.json uses run-over as canonical loss scene while scenes/game.json still declares nextOnLoss as fail
runtime win threshold is inline distance > 3600 instead of manifest-owned
runtime spawn counts and clear radius are inline instead of manifest-owned
runtime jump consumption is a raw boolean reset instead of an ActionFrame/RunnerStepResult fact
runtime hazard, pickup, and win outcomes mutate app.scene or runner state without durable ContactEvent records
runtime host exposes getState only; no diagnostics, dispatch, replay journal, source snapshot, or smoke runner exists yet
requiredFixes: emit ManifestLoadStatus and ManifestDriftReport before changing visible behavior
normalize nextOnLoss from fail to run-over or keep fail as explicit compatibility alias only
surface loaded config, fallback status, alias status, drift status, source snapshot, and fixture status in PrehistoricRushHost.getDiagnostics()
route button, keyboard, and future touch input through ActionFrame records
separate accepted action journal from rejected input diagnostics
route start, retry, menu, run-over, win, and run-again through SceneDispatchResult records
route movement tick, hazard hit, shard pickup, and distance goal through RunnerStepResult, RunnerEvent, and ContactEvent records
add replayable scripted fixture coverage before terrain/render/raptor/camera/flock/Rapier extraction
emit RunMovementPromotionReport after fixture parity defines the shared run-movement-kit boundary

missingProtoKits.reason: No current shared kit owns runner movement, jump buffer/coyote timing, speed ramp, boost, accepted action consumption, step results, and motion/animation descriptors as one reusable contract.

nextImplementationSlice.name: PrehistoricRush Manifest Action Contact Fixture Matrix + Run Movement Promotion Gate
nextImplementationSlice.intent: Make the current playable runner source-auditable, replayable, and ready for run-movement-kit promotion before moving visual, terrain, physics, movement, or flock rules into extracted kits.
buildOrder: preserve index.html, src/runtime.mjs, current Three.js/Rapier visuals, current controls, and current PrehistoricRushHost.getState()
add RuntimeSourceBundle loading before setup()
load game-scenes.json, scenes/*.json, runner-tuning.json, kit-composition.json, kit-cutover-inventory.json, and flock-generation.json
emit ManifestLoadStatus with loaded, failed, fallback, and source path details
emit ManifestDriftReport with live-vs-manifest deltas
add explicit fail -> run-over SceneAliasCatalog entry
adapt runner-tuning.json into RuntimeRunnerTuning while keeping current inline values fallback-only
add SpawnBudgetSource and WinThresholdSource descriptors populated from current inline behavior first
normalize button, keyboard, and future touch input into ActionFrame records
add ActionAcceptanceMatrix for start, retry, run-again, menu, left, right, boost, jump, and future touch actions
emit ActionResult records with stable accepted/rejected reasons
snapshot RunnerSourceState before and after movement
wrap current movement math in RunnerStepResult without changing feel
emit RunnerEvent facts for jump-consumed, boost-active, speed-delta, distance-delta, heading-delta, grounded-change, terrain-rebuild-requested, pickup, impact, goal, and scene-request
emit ContactEvent records for hazard-hit, shard-pickup, and distance-goal
reduce ContactResult snapshots from ContactEvent records
route run-over and win transitions through SceneDispatchResult records
expand PrehistoricRushHost with getDiagnostics(), getSnapshot(), getReplayJournal(), dispatch(actionFrame), runSmoke(name), and runReplayParitySmoke()

add DOM-free fixtures for manifest load, manifest missing fallback, tuning drift, fail alias, start, retry, run-again, jump accepted, jump rejected while airborne, hazard run-over, shard pickup, distance win, and replay parity
add RunMovementPromotionReport that names what should move into run-movement-kit after fixture parity passes
defer terrain/render/raptor/camera/Rapier/flock extraction until source-lock fixtures pass

acceptanceChecklist: Existing runner still boots from index.html.
Existing visual scene and controls remain unchanged.
RuntimeSourceBundle can load all product manifests or report fallback.
ManifestDriftReport lists all live-vs-manifest drift without breaking runtime.
fail -> run-over alias is explicit and testable.
ActionFrame records are generated for button and keyboard input.
ActionResultJournal records accepted and rejected actions.
RunnerStepResult wraps current movement and jump consumption.
RunnerEventJournal records movement, boost, jump, terrain rebuild, pickup, impact, goal, and scene request facts.
ContactEvent records exist for hazard, pickup, and goal.
SceneDispatchResult owns run-over and win scene changes.
PrehistoricRushHost exposes diagnostics, snapshots, replay journal, dispatch, and smokes.
DOM-free replay fixture can reproduce a scripted accepted/rejected action sequence.
RunMovementPromotionReport names the exact shared-kit API candidate and remaining blockers.

validation.notes: Documentation-only pass. No runtime source files changed.
